editorial_note: APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS. Core Nature paper coverage (Cas12a2 RNA-triggered DNA shredding for KRAS-mutant cancer and HPV-infected cells) verified verbatim. Several technical specifics (G12C variant, E6/E7 transcripts, 3- to 4-fold enrichment, ASGCT 2026 venue/dates) appear in the article without being in the cited press releases — corrections record filed.
